steps.title: Place the painting title
steps.content: The title Gun with Hand #1 directly identifies the oil painting, so no comma should separate painting from the title. The following which clause is nonrestrictive, so it needs a comma before it.

steps.title: Reject misplaced commas
steps.content: A omits the comma before the nonrestrictive which clause. B puts an unnecessary comma between painting and the title. D also separates the title incorrectly and omits the comma before which. The correct punctuation attaches the title, then sets off the following clause. The answer is C.
